# Scout Report — {PROJECT_NAME}

<!-- Generated by Phase A Step S — orchestrator composes /tkm:scan-codebase (parallel
     Explore fan-out across top-level dirs), aggregates the slices into this
     file. DO NOT edit manually — this is the file inventory consumed by
     Step 3.1 (business discovery) and Step 4.1 (technical discovery). All
     sections MANDATORY; missing/malformed → both tracks fall back to direct
     repo grep, losing path-coverage guarantees. -->

## Detected Language

{LANGUAGE}
<!-- One line. Examples:
       TypeScript / JavaScript
       PHP
       Python
       Multi: TypeScript / JavaScript + PHP        (also add [MULTI_STACK] to ## Notes)
     Detection priority (root manifest wins):
       package.json → TypeScript/JavaScript;  composer.json → PHP;
       pyproject.toml/setup.py/Pipfile → Python;
       pom.xml/build.gradle → Java/Kotlin;  go.mod → Go;  Cargo.toml → Rust;
       Gemfile → Ruby;  *.csproj/*.sln → C#/.NET;  mix.exs → Elixir;
       pubspec.yaml → Dart/Flutter. -->

## Relevant Files

<!-- One bullet per non-test, non-vendor file. Format:
       - `<relative-path>` [<type>] - <≤100 char description, NO secrets>
     Type tags (mutually exclusive — pick the most specific):
       manifest, lockfile, spec, doc, route, model, permission, config, ci,
       integration:<vendor>, source, other.
     Example: - `src/services/stripe.ts` [integration:stripe] - Stripe checkout client
     Cap: 2000 entries. If exceeded, prefer non-source/other types and add
     [TRUNCATED_INVENTORY] to ## Notes. -->

- `{relative/path/to/file.ext}` [{type}] - {brief description}

## Notes

<!-- Free-form bullets capturing unusual findings:
     - monorepo layout (workspaces, lerna, turborepo, nx, …)
     - path aliases (tsconfig.json#paths, package.json#workspaces)
     - barrel / re-export files
     - [MULTI_STACK] when multiple manifests coexist at root
     - [TRUNCATED_INVENTORY] when ## Relevant Files hit the 2000-bullet cap
     - [SCAFFOLD_ONLY] lockfiles present but no source files
     - [SCOUT_FALLBACK] tkm:scan-codebase fan-out unavailable; direct walk used
     - [SCOUT_BLOCKED] both tkm:scan-codebase and fallback walk failed
     - excluded test/vendor dirs that were noteworthy
     - language-specific caveats -->
- {note}
